They get tied up, wake up in a dark room tied to a chair yadda yadda, except they’re lowkey a little freak and kinda into it despite being a bit spooked at first. 🙏 Any of the Sonnellino members will do, though if I had to be specific maybe….. Ezio or Don would be nice, perhaps even Borys because the way you write him is so cutie

Of COURSE I'm making that sugar baby bot as well, and even if this is a multi bot, I will focus a bit on Ezio and Don
